prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AO15IPHCT-15-CHRM Product Type: TONG_UTENSIL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 15 Inch Metalworking Ceramic Crucible Tongs Melting Precious Metals Description: Melt your precious metals safely with the ASR Outdoor Crucible Tongs.

These tongs screw to tighten the closed steel band around your crucible. The thumbscrew will allow you to secure your tongs to different sized melting dishes or pots. The steel shaft is mounted and secured by a steel pin in the wood handle that will extend the life of your tongs.

These tongs are great for melting, pouring and casting precious metals like gold, silver and copper. Make sure you have a set of these tongs before your next metal melting project. Search Terms: industrial science lab supplies crucible holder ceramic alumina smelting pot raw metals goldsmith tools melting jewelry making hot melt casting alloys compounds Features: - ASR Outdoor Crucible Tongs - 15" Length - Holder Diameter: 3.125" - Adjustable to Diameters of 3-1/8" to 3-1/4" - Handle Material: Wood - Weight: 6oz === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 15 Inch Crucible Tongs for Metal Melting
